programmes.show_description: Alice Ruggles. After Alice Ruggles ends their romantic relationship, her ex-boyfriend Harry Dhillon's refusal to let go turns sinister. S4, Ep6
Vows Of Violence. A young woman is missing in Swansea. Whilst her family search for her, a suitcase containing a badly beaten body is discovered next to the motorway. S1, Ep1
Beneath The Surface. A suitcase containing dismembered body parts is discovered in a Birmingham canal. A nearby address reveals a murderer's attempts to conceal their crime. S1, Ep2
Body In A Barrel. In 2017, Omar Medina's body was found in a barrel in the bay. Police turn to surveillance footage to track down the people responsible for his murder. S9, Ep17
Body Heat. In 2018, Kathy Blair was found murdered at home. Detectives find camera footage containing a shadowy figure that might just be their killer. S9, Ep18

Scattered Clues. Explores three murder cases in which investigators secured convictions from trace evidence, including fingerprinting, fibre analysis and DNA testing. S4, Ep3
Natural Witness. Features investigations in which natural clues, including insect bites, cat hair and a rare form of bacteria helped forensic scientists solve murders. S4, Ep4
A Bitter End. A series of bank robberies in Texas leave authorities baffled. When similar heists begin the next year in California, FBI agents link the crimes. S6, Ep12
Dangerous Gamble. Two masked robbers armed with semi-automatic weapons robbed armoured car couriers of $350,000 in the MGM Grand Hotel and Casino in Las Vegas. S6, Ep13
Gladys Godfrey/Ian McNicholl. How did forensic technology help track down the killer of Gladys Godfrey? Plus, Ian McNicholl tells the horrific story of his abusive ex-girlfriend. S5, Ep2
Love Is War. A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair and it destroys their families and their lives. S4, Ep4
Michele Whitaker: The Last Truck Stop. Michele hitches from a truck stop and vanishes. But her family never give up hope, and incredibly the case ends, years later, with a miracle. S1, Ep3
We Never Fight. A family want answers when their 23-year-old daughter goes missing after a night out. Can security camera footage help detectives hunt down the person responsible? S6, Ep6
The Angel of Death. Efren Saldivar injected patients with paralytic drugs, potentially murdering up to 200 people. Experts analyse the actions of this nurse-turned-serial killer. S2, Ep3
Once A Killer. Joseph Green Brown was on death row for 13 years before his convictions were overturned. Decades later, he would be charged for the murder of his wife. S7, Ep1
By Design. Talented artist Kira and marketing manager Matthew appear to be happily married. Until one day, a maintenance worker makes a grisly discovery. S7, Ep5
The Great Don Lewis. A popular musician, beloved in the community, suddenly disappears from his jazz club along with his employee. Detectives must find them before it's too late. S3, Ep6
Rachel Williams/Thomas Edwards. A woman's life hangs in the balance after she escapes a controlling relationship. Plus, a family are left devastated as a result of dangerous driving. S5, Ep4
Blood Bath. Mum-of-two Nikki Whitehead is brutally murdered in her own home. Police suspect she may have known her killer. Polygraphs and CCTV footage help reveal the horrific truth. S2, Ep9
Vanishing Act. The FBI works to locate a kidnapped housewife from a quiet luxury neighbourhood in Florida, but all is not as it seems. S2, Ep1
Causing Chaos. Drivers witness acrobatic crashes. An aggressive driver faces a big problem. A motorist dodges a bullet. An angry driver follows a woman home. S2, Ep11
Bikers' Battlegrounds. A furious driver takes out his anger on another car. Motorcyclists deal with aggressive drivers. A biker faces off with a bat-wielding man. S2, Ep12
Gladys Godfrey/Ian McNicholl. How did forensic technology help track down the killer of Gladys Godfrey? Plus, Ian McNicholl tells the horrific story of his abusive ex-girlfriend. S5, Ep2
The Body Snatcher. A headless body is found in a suitcase in the Peak District. The investigation uncovers a gruesome attempt at a complete identity theft. S1, Ep3
Jigsaw Killer. When a torso is discovered in a suitcase, police link it to other body parts found nearby. An investigation unearths a gruesome tale of greed and depravity. S1, Ep4
The Wrong Woman. In 2017, Alisha Canales-McGuire was shot dead. Detectives can find no reason why anyone would kill Alisha until CCTV leads to a tangled murder plot. S9, Ep19
Not A Social Person. When a motorist shoots Whitney Gray, detectives follow a trail of CCTV to track down the suspect car - only to discover that the killer is on the run. S9, Ep20

Presumed Dead. Three cases illustrating the extreme measures investigators take to catch a killer when a missing person is presumed dead but no body can be found. S4, Ep6
Cold Cases. Investigates murder cases that took a decade or more to solve and how detectives can solve such cases when clues have become scarce. S4, Ep8
Dangerous Takedown. In 1997 two burglars broke into a home and shot at a police officer. One year later clues to the location of the suspects are revealed. S6, Ep14
Inside The Bureau. When a bank manager was unable to open the bank vault, the FBI was called in, revealing a sophisticated burglary with estimated losses of $8 million. S6, Ep15
Rachel Williams/Thomas Edwards. A woman's life hangs in the balance after she escapes a controlling relationship. Plus, a family are left devastated as a result of dangerous driving. S5, Ep4
Together Forever, Forever Together. A teenager who isn't allowed to date falls in love with a senior at school. They go to extreme lengths to be together and it ends in disaster. S4, Ep7
Royal Daniel: Royal Secrets. The disappearance of a local lawyer paralyses a mountain town in Colorado. Soon clues emerge that the community's idyllic veneer is not all it seems. S1, Ep4
No Place Like Home. A young professional is murdered in her apartment in Orlando. Detectives turn to CCTV footage to solve the case and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice. S6, Ep8
Murder As Seen On TV. Megan Haines was a nurse who murdered two nursing home residents by injecting them with insulin. Experts analyse the actions of this disturbing serial killer. S2, Ep4
Stage Fright. Stephanie is a gifted stage performer and much-loved teacher. But behind closed doors, resentment and envy fester in her marriage, leading to a shocking 911 call. S7, Ep7
Dance With Me. Ramon Sosa is a father of three who runs a successful boxing gym in Texas. He feels like the luckiest man alive until someone marks him for murder. S7, Ep13
The Girl In The Park. A group of men discover a woman's body in a park in Red Valley, Arizona. Investigators have leads, but can they gather enough concrete evidence? S4, Ep2
Paul, Dawn And Samantha. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the murder of three young children in 1973. Plus, a mother fights to change the law after her son is killed. S5, Ep5
Vanished From Campus. Student Christian Aguilar mysteriously vanishes from his university campus. Police are stumped until CCTV footage takes the case in a shocking new direction. S2, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: True Crime Lies. A decades-old Pennsylvania murder case heats up when a Texas Ranger visits a person of interest who may hold the answers. S1, Ep5
The Serial Killer Who Only Killed Once. The weekend before Thanksgiving, a killer slays Robin Lawrence at home while her child is asleep. A relentless investigation circles her husband. S9, Ep8
